QF.id: III-C Prevention of Money Laundering Act_21

question.text: What penalty was imposed on Shreepati Holdings & Finance for AML/CFT violations?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** As per Case 9.2, a penalty of Rs. 3,00,000 was imposed on SHF under Section 15HB of SEBI Act. **The Trap:** Higher penalties may seem appropriate given the violations but the AO considered the nature and circumstances. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Penalties for AML violations serve as deterrents but are also calibrated to the severity and nature of the violation.
